MOT & Garage Management Software for London Garages

Increase your garage revenue by 40% with automated MOT reminders, DVSA integration, and smart advisory tracking. Local support from our London office.

Why London Garages Choose Garage Boost

We understand the unique challenges of running a garage in London and across the UK. Our MOT reminder software is built for garages like yours.

🏢

Local Support Team

Our support team is based in Great Portland Street, London. Fast response times, local understanding.

🔗

DVSA MOT Integration

Direct access to official DVSA MOT data. Automated reminders based on real compliance dates.

📈

40% Revenue Increase

Average increase for London garages: £3,200-5,100 per month in the first 90 days.

📱

SMS & Email Reminders

Automated reminders at 30, 14, and 7 days before MOT expiry. 98% SMS open rate.

💡

Smart Advisory Capture

Automatically extract MOT advisories and turn them into quoted jobs. No manual data entry.

👥

Customer CRM

Complete customer database with vehicle history, MOT dates, and service records.

How Garage Boost Works For Your London Garage

1

Import MOT Data

Connect your DVSA account (2 minutes). We automatically fetch all customer MOT records.

2

Set Reminders

Choose reminder dates (30/14/7 days). Customize SMS/Email messages with your branding.

3

Automate Advisories

We extract MOT advisories and generate professional quotes in seconds. No manual work.

4

Track Results

Watch conversions, revenue, and customer engagement in real-time dashboard.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Garage Boost suitable for small London garages?

Yes! We start at £0/month free plan for garages with up to 50 vehicles. Scale to Pro (£49/month) as you grow. Most London garages are on the free or Pro plan.

How is your support based in London?

Our team is based at Great Portland Street, London W1W 5PF. Call us at 07380 448187 or email cs@bizzboost.uk for direct support.

Does Garage Boost work with DVSA data for London garages?

Yes. Directly integrates with DVSA MOT records. Works nationwide, including all London postcodes (SW, SE, NW, NE, E, W, etc.).

How quickly will I see revenue increase?

Most garages see +15-20% revenue lift in the first 30 days. London garages average +£3,200-5,100/month within 90 days.

Can I customize reminder messages?

Yes. Full control over SMS and email templates. Include your garage name, phone, link to online booking, anything you want.
